data.description: Imagine ending your day with a gentle sea breeze and a sunset view from your own front porch. Welcome to 3 Birch Close in the highly sought-after Camelot Village, Discovery Bay. This pristine 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom bungalow, completed in 2023, is the perfect blend of modern comfort and coastal serenity. Inside, you’ll find an airy, open layout characterized by high ceilings and a cool atmosphere, thanks to three AC units and ceiling fans throughout. The home sits on an impressively large 6,000 sq. ft. lot, providing plenty of room for gardening, outdoor entertaining, or future expansions. Plus, with installed solar features, you can enjoy a more sustainable lifestyle. Community living here is second to none. Camelot Village offers 24-hour gated security, a large children's park, an outdoor gym, and a football field. When you’re ready for a dip in the ocean, you are just a short walk away from the crystal-clear waters of Puerto Seco Beach and local shopping. Whether you’re looking for a permanent residence or a vacation retreat on the North Coast, this home is ready for you.

Located within Paradisiac Beach Club, The Ruby is a brand-new 3-bedroom, 3.5-bathroom beachfront house designed for modern coastal living. This Phase 2 residence features an open-concept layout, contemporary finishes, spacious en-suite bedrooms, a sleek modern kitchen, indoor laundry, private garage, and landscaped outdoor spaces perfect for entertaining or relaxing by the sea. Paradisiac Beach Club is a visionary 5-phase waterfront development offering a resort-style lifestyle with planned amenities including water features, two marinas, a helipad, fishing village, scenic boardwalk, putting course, pools, and direct beach access. Ideally positioned along Jamaica’s North Coast between Ocho Rios and Runaway Bay, the community offers easy access to major attractions, airports, and everyday conveniences. Perfect as a primary residence, vacation home, or investment property with excellent short-term rental potential. Call for more details. 876-997-1790

Located within Paradisiac Beach Club, The Onyx is a brand-new 3-bedroom, 3.5-bathroom beachfront townhouse designed for modern coastal living. This Phase 2 residence features an open-concept layout, contemporary finishes, spacious en-suite bedrooms, a sleek modern kitchen, indoor laundry, private garage, and landscaped outdoor spaces perfect for entertaining or relaxing by the sea. Paradisiac Beach Club is a visionary 5-phase waterfront development offering a resort-style lifestyle with planned amenities including water features, two marinas, a helipad, fishing village, scenic boardwalk, putting course, pools, and direct beach access. Ideally positioned along Jamaica’s North Coast between Ocho Rios and Runaway Bay, the community offers easy access to major attractions, airports, and everyday conveniences. Perfect as a primary residence, vacation home, or investment property with excellent short-term rental potential. Call for more details. 876-997-1790

On one of the hills of Cardiff Hall perched this memorable property, which comprises of seven bedrooms and four bathrooms shared among four units, (2 + 2 +2 + 1). A sound and solid structure like this will look quite handsome in any portfolio be it personal. group, business, or strictly investment purposes. Also, the equity and dividends keep on growing. And for the conservative home/business purchaser, this is a flexible style building. The two, two bedrooms apartment can easily be converted in a three- or four-bedrooms home, depending on your preference. Outline for the staircase design was done in the past. The complex has three verandahs, and two venued style patios for big events. The north coast bypass and the beaches are less than ten minutes away. Limitless recreational spots, eateries, and so forth. Full scale amenities are there with access to the restricted beach. The property has always had one owner. Taken into consideration of the previous wears and tears on the property, is the reason we priced the property at only 65,000,000.00 JMD.

Own this beautiful 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom home located in Coolshade at Richmond, one of the North Coast’s premier residential communities. This spacious unit features an expansive backyard—perfect for gardening, a safe play area for kids, or hosting family and friends outdoors. Residents enjoy access to premium amenities including a kids’ park, community pool, gym, and clubhouse, all within a secure and well-maintained community. Plus, Richmond is in close proximity to some of the North Coast’s best beaches, restaurants, and top local attractions, making it an ideal place to call home or invest. Comfortable living, modern amenities, and a prime location all in one.

This detached split-level multi-family residence with measured Grose floor area of approximately (8,400 ft2) distributed across four floor levels, which is visible from the rear of the building, layout is arrange as follows: first floor master Bedroom with balcony, en-suite bathroom, three additional bedrooms with en-suite bathrooms, kitchen dining, living area, sitting area and two additional balconies, the layout appears to have a separate single family area which features two bedrooms, two bathrooms, Kitchen/living and balcony, another area which is unfinished at the time of inspection, this area is said to be comprised of two bed, two bath, kitchen, living/dining apartment. an additional area which is partially complete is to accommodate three bedrooms, two bathrooms, kitchen/living and dining. basement area is also designed to accommodate a two-bedroom, one bathrooms, kitchen living and dining apartment.

This property is ideally located just 1.2 km from the centre of Browns Town, St. Ann, 950 m from the new Browns Town Clinic currently under construction, and 900 m from Browns Town Infant School. The building is of solid construction but sustained some damage during Hurricane Melissa. The roof has already been replaced over one area, while the remaining areas are reinforced concrete slab. Some interior work is required, and the ground tank at the rear needs repair due to a leak. The layout offers excellent flexibility—it can be easily converted into two self-contained 2-bedroom, 1-bath units, or maintained as a spacious 4-bedroom, 2-bath home. Property is on almost half an acre of land. This versatile property is ideal for an investor, developer, or family looking for potential. Call now to schedule an appointment.

Experience elevated coastal living in this beautiful, luxurious penthouse apartment located in the well-maintained Crystal Cove Villas. Spanning three floors, this spacious unit offers a unique layout with private balconies on each level—perfect for relaxing and enjoying the refreshing Caribbean Sea breeze. Residents can take full advantage of the exceptional amenities, including an infinity pool, secluded beach cove, BBQ area, children’s play space, generator, and beautifully landscaped green areas. The apartment is offered fully furnished, making it move-in ready, and is ideally positioned within walking distance of restaurants, entertainment, and popular attractions. With 24-hour security and a central location, this penthouse combines comfort, convenience, and resort-style living. Don't hesitate to call your Realtor and make this your beachfront home.

Don't miss this opportunity to buy today and start your Airbnb business tomorrow OR just bring your clothes. This is a great vacation home or investment property, and it is being sold fully furnished, fully solar and water tank. Experience luxury living in this newly built home, nestled in the exclusive 24 hour gates community of Ocho Rios Country Club, which is one of the most sought-after and prestigious gated community in Ocho Rios, St. Ann. This gated community consist of 2 & 3 bedroom houses, and 3 bedroom townhouses. It has a fully equipped gym, club house, swimming pool, roof top balcony, multipurpose court, well-manicured green spaces and kids recreational area. This 1,250 sq ft home is 2 bed, 2 bath with open concept living/dining/kitchen, laundry room and front verandah. It is located 10 minutes from the North Coast Highway and 2 minutes from beautiful beaches and the resort town of Ocho Rios, one of Jamaica's most loved destinations including Dunn's River Fall, Dolphin Cove, Ocho Rios Jerk Centre, Green Grotto Cave, Chukka Cove, Mystic Mountain Rainforest, Margaritaville, shopping mall, restaurants and much more. Call today for viewing.

Sometimes we just need to escape a ‘foreign land’ and enjoy a safe space with a little morning view of the Caribbean sea. This corner unit was handcrafted with love and is being offered fully furnished with the owners sense of style and meticulous maintenance practices. All chakras align on this one. Your very spacious balcony overlooks the entire lush expanse of the Fern Court lawns and entertainment gazebos and offers a small view of the caribbean Sea. With resort-style amenities, a homely feel and furniture to match, this apartment offers the perfect blend of luxury, security, and convenience in one of St. Ann's most sought-after gated communities. Bonus #1 - you can earn while you are away. This unit is short term rental friendly bonus#2 - the unit square footage was expanded to add a loft so your accommodation is definitely increased to 3 bedrooms or a home office. The time is now!! Buy it. Let’s talk.

Elevate your lifestyle at Pyramid Point, Ocho Rios. This architectural gem offers a sophisticated blend of sleek, modern design and panoramic coastal views. Every detail of this 3-bedroom, 3.5-bathroom residence has been curated for the discerning homeowner - from the chef-inspired contemporary kitchen to the expansive open-concept living space that flows effortlessly toward the horizon. Each bedroom serves as a private sanctuary with a dedicated en-suite, while the master suite offers unrivaled tranquility. Outside, the infinity pool serves as your front-row seat to the best sunsets in Jamaica. Complete with a private garden, 24-hour security, and elite community amenities, this is more than a home - it’s your private piece of paradise.

5.14 acres of uninterrupted sea views, spanning from Drax Hall to Trelawny. This 4-bed, 3-bath home is more than a house, it's an opportunity to expand into a family compound or a small development with the right approvals in place. A section of the property was once operated as a farm; which explains the 7 concrete pads ranging from 3,000 sq ft to 3,3600 sq ft., an abundance of fruit trees (ackee, breadfruit, soursop, sweet sop, mangos, passion fruit), lumber trees (cedar, Spanish elm, guango). This is literally your last chance to grab a special property in a rapidly expanding tourist mecca.

Command your presence in the most coveted beachfront corridor on Jamaica’s North Coast. Presenting a rare resale opportunity for The Sapphire at the exclusive Paradisiac Beach Club. This luxury condominium is the epitome of "Boutique Living," offering a sophisticated 1,450sq.ft footprint designed for the discerning investor and the lifestyle seeker alike. The Interior Strategy: Step into a masterclass of modern open-concept design. The Sapphire is engineered for flow, light, and high-velocity ROI. Key features include: * Ensuite Excellence: Both bedrooms feature private ensuite bathrooms, with a convenient powder room for guests a configuration that maximizes rental premiums and resident privacy. * The Master Retreat: Features a spacious walk-in closet and premium high-quality finishes that reflect the "Jewel of the Caribbean" standard. * Functional Luxury: A dedicated laundry room, sleek modern cabinetry, and expansive balconies designed to capture the breathtaking St. Ann vistas. World-class resort-style ecosystem: Beachfront & Maritime Access. Wellness & Recreation. On-Site Convenience. 45 minutes from Ian Fleming. Don’t make a move without a strategy. Secure the flagship today!

Discover the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and investment potential with this beautifully appointed two-bedroom, two-bathroom apartment located in the highly sought-after Richmond community in Ocho Rios, St. Ann. Spanning approximately 1,100 square feet, this fully furnished, turnkey-ready property is ideal for both personal use and short- or long-term rental income. Thoughtfully designed and impeccably maintained, the unit offers modern interiors, spacious bedrooms, and a seamless indoor-outdoor flow. Premium amenities, including a swimming pool, 24-hour security, gym and a tennis court, all within a well-kept and secure neighborhood. Perfectly positioned, the property is just minutes away from some of Jamaica’s most popular attractions, including Dunn's River Falls, and Dolphin Cove, along with a wide array of restaurants, beaches, and entertainment options. Whether you are seeking a vacation home or a high-performing investment property, this rare offering combines lifestyle and location in one of the island’s most desirable areas.

This charming 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom home is located in the secure, gated community of Drax Hall Country Club, offering comfort, convenience, and a relaxed lifestyle. The property features a spacious layout ideal for modern living, complemented by mature fruit trees including nesberry and bananas, perfect for enjoying a touch of nature right in your backyard. Residents of the community enjoy access to a range of amenities, including a swimming pool, fully equipped gym, tennis court, and beautifully maintained common areas. The home is ideally situated just minutes from the beach, shopping centers, restaurants, and essential services, as well as the Knutsford Express and the highway, ensuring easy travel and connectivity. Centrally located and thoughtfully designed, this property is well-suited for families, professionals, returning residents, or retirees seeking a secure and vibrant community to call home.

Perched in a tranquil hillside setting, this modern home offers a seamless blend of comfort and style. The open-concept layout is complemented by contemporary finishes, generous natural light, and inviting living spaces that flow effortlessly for both everyday living and entertaining. Each bedroom is designed with en-suite bathrooms, providing privacy and convenience for residents and guests alike. Residents of Pyramid Point enjoy access to premium amenities, including 24 hour security, a clubhouse, pool, gym, tennis court, and the beautifully maintained grounds all set against a backdrop of breathtaking ocean and mountain views. Ideally located just minutes from the vibrant town of Ocho Rios, beaches, and major attractions, this property presents an exceptional opportunity for homeowners, returning residents, or investors seeking a prime asset in a thriving location. Furniture can be included at an additional cost of $3 million Call today to schedule your viewing!!

This centrally located split-level house is a great investment property with tonnes of potential still available for further development of the one-third acre lot. With a total of 6 bedrooms and 5 bathrooms, the building has been modified to provide four (4) separate apartments, allowing multiple occupations and multiple streams of rental income for you, the next owner. There is 2-bed, 1-bath, a 2-bed, 2-bath, and two 1-bedroom apartments. Additional spaces on the building include the laundry room, helpers quarters, storeroom and utility space plus a large garage. The upper level provides the most calming views of the sea which is literally only 10 minutes walk away. The community sits along the north coast highway and the property is 5 minutes from St. Ann's Bay and 20 minutes from Ocho Rios with all the amenities you might need within very easy reach. This is a turn-key investment with so much room for growth, you really should give it a good look, for your own good and for your future.

This well-appointed studio apartment is perfectly positioned in Great Pond, Ocho Rios a prime location. An excellent choice for first-time buyers or investors. This unit offers a blend of comfort and practicality. Located on the first floor, the apartment features an enclosed balcony, an open-concept studio living space with a builtin closet, a functional kitchen and a bathroom. Priced to sell. Don’t miss, make your offer today!

Welcome to refined living in the prestigious, gated community of Plantation Village, St. Ann—an address synonymous with privacy, exclusivity, and tranquility. Set on approximately 1 acre of beautifully positioned land, this impressive 5-bedroom, 5-bathroom residence offers a rare blend of space, comfort, and understated luxury. Designed for both relaxed living and elegant entertaining, the home provides a serene retreat surrounded by lush, natural beauty. Each bedroom is generously sized, complemented by well-appointed bathrooms, creating a home that is both functional and refined. The expansive grounds offer endless possibilities for outdoor living, whether you envision landscaped gardens, leisure spaces, or simply enjoying the peaceful surroundings. Located just minutes from Ocho Rios, the property provides easy access to world-class attractions, beaches, shopping, and dining, while maintaining the privacy and calm of an exclusive residential enclave. Property Highlights: 5 Bedrooms, 5 Bathrooms Approximately 1 acre of land Located in a secure, gated luxury community

Luxurious 3-Bedroom Home for Sale in Pyramid Point, Ocho Rios Discover modern living at its finest in this stunning 3-bedroom, 3.5-bathroom home located in the highly sought-after Pyramid Point development, just minutes from the vibrant town of Ocho Rios, St. Ann. This elegantly designed home features a spacious open-concept layout that seamlessly connects the living and dining areas, creating the perfect space for relaxation and entertainment. The kitchen is equipped with ample countertop space and storage, making it both stylish and functional. Additional features include air conditioning units, ceiling fans, and a smoke alarm for added comfort and safety. Residents of Pyramid Point enjoy premium amenities, including 24-hour security, a swimming pool, a fully equipped gym, and a clubhouse. Don't miss this incredible opportunity to own a luxurious home in one of Ocho Rios' most desirable communities.

Situated within the well-established Club Caribbean Court complex, this 1-bedroom, 1-bathroom apartment—Strata Lot No. 5—offers a comfortable and convenient living experience in the sought-after Llandovery area of Runaway Bay. The unit is thoughtfully laid out to maximize space and functionality, making it ideal for a first-time homeowner, vacation retreat, or investment opportunity. The bedroom provides a cozy and private setting, while the bathroom is designed for everyday comfort. The property is being sold fully furnished, offering a turnkey opportunity for immediate occupancy or rental income. Located just minutes from the coastline, shopping, and other essential amenities, this property combines tranquility with accessibility. The surrounding community is known for its relaxed atmosphere and proximity to some of the parish’s most popular attractions. Whether you are seeking a personal getaway or an income-generating property, this apartment presents an excellent opportunity to own a piece of Saint Ann Parish’s vibrant north coast.

Located in the quiet rural community of Hinds Town, St. Ann, this 3-bedroom, 1-bathroom home offers a peaceful living environment while still being conveniently close to major town centres. Hinds Town is approximately 25 minutes from Ocho Rios, providing easy access to shopping, employment, and entertainment while maintaining a relaxed countryside atmosphere. The property requires some upgrading, making it an excellent opportunity for a buyer to add value and customize the home to their own taste. Ideal for: - First-time buyers entering the market - Investors seeking a renovation or flip opportunity This property offers strong potential in a peaceful St. Ann location with growing interest due to its proximity to Ocho Rios. Cash buyers only Contact today for more information or to arrange a viewing.

Lot 96 is located in the gorgeous gated community of Camelot Village in Discovery Bay, St. Ann, This house is in an area where you will get stunning views of the Caribbean sea! This property is a 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom house with 960 sq ft of living space, built with solid concrete and ceramic tile flooring. You'll enjoy modern amenities like air conditioner, solar water heater, and 24 hoursecurity. It's close to Puerto Seco Beach and other attractions.

Welcome to this versatile and income-generating property nestled in the sought-after community of Camelot Village. Designed with both comfort and profitability in mind, this expansive residence offers 6 bedrooms, 6.5 bathrooms, and 3 fully equipped kitchens, thoughtfully divided into three self-contained units. Each unit provides privacy and convenience, making this property ideal for multi-family living, long-term rentals, or a high-yield Airbnb investment. The layout allows for flexible use—live in one unit while generating income from the others, or maximize returns by operating all three as short-term rentals. Property Highlights: 6 spacious bedrooms, each with en-suite bathroom access 6.5 modern bathrooms with quality finishes 3 full kitchens, perfect for independent living spaces Configured into 3 separate self-contained units Ideal for Airbnb, rental income, or extended family living Located in a quiet, developing residential community This property presents a rare opportunity to secure a turnkey investment in one of St. Ann’s growing residential areas. With increasing demand for short-term accommodations and rental housing, this home is perfectly positioned

Located in the desirable gated community of Pyramid Point, this beautifully designed 3-bedroom, 3½-bathroom home offers comfort, privacy, and modern living in one of Jamaica’s most vibrant resort towns. Each bedroom features its own en-suite bathroom, complemented by a convenient powder room for guests. The property boasts spacious interiors, an open-concept layout, and is ideal for families, returning residents, or investment buyers seeking a tranquil yet connected lifestyle. Just minutes away, Ocho Rios provides a wide range of amenities including shopping plazas, supermarkets, restaurants, medical facilities, and entertainment options. Enjoy easy access to world-renowned attractions such as Dunn’s River Falls, and Dolphin Cove, along with beautiful beaches and vibrant nightlife. With 24-hour security and a peaceful environment, this home at Pyramid Point offers the perfect balance of secure community living and convenient access to all that Ocho Rios has to offer. Being sold, furnished, this turn-key home is ideal as a primary residence, vacation home, or income-generating property.

This exquisite unique home, with over 20,000 sqft of modern luxury located in the prime and well sought after of Draxhall, St. Ann. First world commercial spaces are within touching distance of this development. Inside the home, the ground floor has a grand hall with double bowing stairs, living, dining, large kitchen as well as a theatre. All finishes are brand new first world quality. The first floor contains 5 large bedrooms and 4 bathrooms inclusive of a luxurious primary bedroom with its own walk-in closet and bath. The bathroom fixtures are high end luxury Rubinet brand. Accompanying this setup is also a self contained helpers quarters. The common area has an office and additional multi-purpose room. Each room in the house has customized tray ceilings, the flooring includes a mixture of high end marble tiles and natural Brazilian mahogany hardwood floor. There is a large 2 car garage at the end of a massive courtyard and foyer. There is a river next door where you can do recreational fishing.

Positioned in the heart of Ocho Rios, this cozy 1-bedroom, 1-bathroom condo at Mystic Ridge offers the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and strong investment potential. Being sold fully furnished, this turnkey unit is ready for immediate occupancy or seamless short-term and long-term rental income. Enjoy resort-style amenities including a swimming pool, tennis court, and 24-hour security and is ideally located just minutes from the beach and renowned attractions such as Mystic Mountain, Dolphin Cove, Dunn’s River Falls, and The Cove Theatre, as well as the Ocho Rios Cruise Ship Pier. Shopping, restaurants, and essential services are conveniently within walking distance. With Ocho Rios continuing to experience strong demand for short-term rentals, this is an excellent opportunity to secure a high-performing asset in one of Jamaica’s most active tourism hubs. Schedule your viewing today and make your offer.

Discover comfort, privacy, and effortless living in this beautifully appointed 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom fully furnished, fully solar powered home, ideally situated on a quiet cul-de-sac within a secure gated community. Set on a generous 7,087 sq. ft. lot, this property offers the perfect blend of space, convenience, and lifestyle appeal. Designed for modern living, the home comes fully furnished, making it move-in ready for homeowners or an excellent turnkey investment opportunity. Fully solar powered- no electricity bills- this home has it all. Residents enjoy access to premium community amenities, including a swimming pool, clubhouse, and 24-hour security, creating a safe and welcoming environment for families, professionals, or returning residents. Richmond estate also has a pharmacy, supermarket, restaurant and Devon House Ice-cream shop located at the front of the community. Whether you are seeking a primary residence, vacation home, or income-earning property, this home delivers exceptional value in a well-maintained, highly desirable community.

Nestled within an intimate complex of just 8 units in the upscale community of Cardiff Hall, this beautifully appointed 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment offers the perfect blend of comfort and privacy. Designed for relaxed island living, the apartment features a functional layout with spacious bedrooms, modern bathrooms, and inviting living areas enhanced by large windows and sliding glass doors. These features flood the space with natural light and create a seamless indoor-outdoor flow, allowing you to enjoy refreshing breezes and a close connection to the surrounding greenery. The primary bedroom opens out to a private balcony, providing the perfect spot to unwind, enjoy the fresh air, and take in the peaceful surroundings. This property has private beach access, giving you the luxury of enjoying the crystal-clear waters and serene coastline just minutes away. Conveniently located, the apartment is within close proximity to a variety of restaurants, supermarkets, and essential amenities, making daily living both easy and enjoyable. Priced to sell!! Call for an appointment to view today!

This is a spacious 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms property. It’s located in a gated community with well kept public spaces. Neighboring properties in the community are also well maintained. This is the perfect investment property in an ideal location in St. Ann.

Nestled in the peaceful community of Bellaire Runaway Bay, this well maintained single storey home offers comfort, space and great potential for homeowners and investors. The property is enclosed with a gated entrance, a spacious yard and has potential for future expansions. Location just minutes away from beaches, shopping areas and essential amenities. Ideal as a starter home, or investment property.

a serene, elevated oasis nestled in the cool hills of Beecher Town, just 10 minutes from the vibrant resort town. Enjoy breathtaking panoramic views while discovering your dream home in this exclusive, gated community. Choose from our beautifully designed 2- and 3-bedroom residences, each offering modern comfort in a secure, private setting with 24-hour security for complete peace of mind. Live the life of leisure you deserve with premium amenities including: A sophisticated clubhouse for social gatherings and events Pristine tennis courts for recreation and fitness A sparkling swimming pool for relaxation and family fun A children’s playground to delight the little ones Convenient on-site restaurants for effortless dining A community basic school for easy access to education Perfectly positioned to combine the energy of Ocho Rios with the tranquility of a private hillside retreat, this is more than a home — it’s an exceptional lifestyle.

This beautifully maintained 2-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom residence is located on South Beach Boulevard in Pyramid Point, Ocho Rios, St. Ann. The property features a manicured lawn, paved 3-car driveway, gazebo, and is the last lot on the boulevard, offering added privacy and tranquil mountain views. Designed for comfort, the home offers a family-friendly layout with modern furnishings and fixtures throughout. The kitchen features a stylish island and flows seamlessly into the living areas. The bedrooms are well appointed, and the property includes two patios; perfect for relaxing or entertaining. Enjoy morning coffee on the front porch or unwind on the back patio for a more private, peaceful setting.

Welcome to Pyramid Point, an exceptional gated community where contemporary design meets the natural beauty of St. Ann, Jamaica. Ideally located just minutes from the vibrant town of Ocho Rios, Lot 166 offers a rare opportunity to own a stylish, fully furnished home. This residence invites you to enjoy stunning views and a lifestyle defined by comfort and convenience. Residents have access to premium amenities, including an infinity pool, a nearby convenience store, and a fully equipped gym—everything you need right at your doorstep. Whether you're seeking a serene family home, a vacation retreat, or an investment property, Pyramid Point delivers the perfect balance of modern living and Caribbean charm. Schedule your private viewing today and discover why this could be your next dream home.

Nestled in the foothills of St. Ann, 10 mins. East of Ocho Rios bordering the White River, & 20 mins from Ian Fleming Airport, is the charming country house " Blue Horizon". Built in the mid-80s on approx. 1/2 acre, with garden & sea views from upstairs and downstairs, this tropical garden boasts assorted fruit trees - mangoes, starfruit, june plum, breadfruit, coconut, otahiti apples to name a few! Originally as a single family home, now 'subdivided'; upstairs: 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, open plan living & dining, kitchen, front & back patio of approx. 1,715 sq ft inclusive of 600 gal. tank & pump, washer/dryer & clothesline with its own electric & water meter. A partially covered courtyard offers al fresco dining. Downstairs: large one bedroom, bathroom, open plan kitchen/dining/living, office/bedroom, "utility/storage area" of approx 1,129 sq ft. The entire property equipped with 800 gal. tank & pump, washer, clothesline, own electric & water meters, independent entrance across from shared parking which accommodates 3 vehicles comfortably. Steep driveway is negotiated with front & Four Wheel Drive vehicles. Being sold unfurnished, as is, cash sale only, appliances alone included.

Located in the tranquil community of Chester District, Laughlands nestled between St. Ann’s Bay and Runaway Bay. It’s just about one kilometer from the north coast highway, providing easy access to local attractions, beaches, and amenities. Property has a total of 6 bedrooms and 4 bathrooms layout over 2 floors as follows: Ground floor two 1-bedroom, 1-bathroom units, each with a cozy living area and a functional kitchen. Perfect for a single or couple seeking a compact and efficient living space. Top floor two 2-bedrooms, 1-bathroom units which also includes spacious bedrooms, a bathroom, living area, and kitchen. Ideal for couples or a small families looking for a comfortable living space. The property offers scenic views of the surrounding area and the Caribbean Sea from the top floor. Nearby attractions include Green Grotto Caves, Puerto Seco beach and others. Approximately 15 minutes from Ocho Rios and 45 minutes from the Sangster international Airport. This property is a great investment opportunity, offering multiple rental units in a semi-rural location.

Located just 10 minutes from St. Ann’s Bay and 20 minutes from the vibrant town of Ocho Rios, this well-maintained property offers an excellent opportunity for comfortable living and income generation. Ideally positioned in a convenient and accessible area, the home is close to essential amenities including beaches, supermarkets, restaurants, banks, and medical facilities. The house is thoughtfully designed across two self-contained levels, making it perfect for multi-family living or rental income. Each level features its own private entrance, ensuring privacy and independence for occupants. The ground floor comprises two bedrooms and one bathroom, along with a functional kitchen, living, and dining area. The layout is practical and inviting, ideal for everyday living or as a rental unit. Upstairs, the first floor offers two bedrooms and two bathrooms, providing additional comfort and convenience. This level also includes its own kitchen, living, and dining spaces, mirroring the independence and functionality of the ground floor. The property is in excellent condition and is move-in ready, allowing new owners to settle in immediately without the need for renovations.

Welcome to the beautifully built Palazzo Royale located in Cardiff Hall, Runaway Bay. Conveniently located on the main floor, this 1470 sqft 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom apartment boasts high end decor & finishes including a quartz waterfall countertop and full quartz slab backsplash. Stainless steel appliances, stacked front load washer & dryer, ceiling fans and air conditioning with remotes. Two large balconies, one from the master bedroom. Master bedroom ensuite with upgraded double his and hers sinks. Built in electronic combination door with camera. LED pot lights, tinted windows and high end zebra blinds for maximum privacy. Freshly painted and drive within 5 minutes to access Ocean Park private beach, shopping, food, groceries and much more amenities nearby. 10 minutes to Discovery Bay, Puerto Seco Beach and more restaurants. 20 minutes to Ocho Rios, Dunns River Falls. 1 hour drive Sangster International Airport (Montego Bay) and 40 minutes from Ian Fleming International Airport. Great unit with an amazing AirBNB track record available. Perfect property for investment, vacation or daily living. Motivated sellers and priced to sell.

This well constructed 8-bedroom 7.5-bathroom house is an investor's dream. The building consists of 4 different apartments a 4 bedroom 3 bathroom, 2 bedroom 2 bathroom, 1 bedroom 1 bathroom and a studio apartment, With large balconies overlooking a spacious well fruited yard, it's easily accessible from the main road. Call today to live your dream.

This two-bedroom townhouse is ideally located in a small 9-unit complex in the upscale and quiet residential community of Marvins Park. This is an established residential area located southeast of the major commercial area and urban center of Ocho Rios. The area affords tranquility and a natural scenic beauty/ desirable condition for residential/resort purposes. Its importance as a suburb has generated the provision of ample peripheral neighborhood convenience centers and easy access to urban facilities and amenities, such as educational, religious, health and recreational institutions, among other services. Marvins Park is also close to numerous attractions such as the Fern Gully, Mystic Mountain Rainforest, Dolphin Cove, Turtle River Park, Dunn’s River Falls and Park and the Sandals Golf and Country Club. Ocho Rios is almost mid-way between Kingston and Montego Bay and enjoys good transportation links by ground, sea via the pier and by air via Ian Fleming International Airport.

Lancewood Meadows/Bonham Spring is an established residential development located east of the major commercial area and urban centre of Ocho Rios, in the parish of Saint Ann called Bonham Spring. This area while being in close proximity to Ocho Rios, is also close to other resort areas of Boscobel, Tower Isle and Harmony Hall. Bonham Spring enjoys spin-off benefits from these areas and consequently a stable development pattern has emerged with modern elements of construction, the area is also complemented by neighbouring communities such as Upton, Eltham, Exchange, White River and Marvins Park. The area also benefits from good climatic conditions, peaceful and a pleasant environment. Saint Ann’s Bay and Ocho Rios provide ample urban facilities and amenities, such as educational, religious, health and recreational institutions, among other services for this community. The house is modern and the immediate surroundings are quiet and private. Communal features to the development includes a well maintained ground incorporating gardens, clubhouse, green areas/parks, swimming pool, 24 hour guard security at point of access and exit.

Welcome to this expansive and versatile 6-bedroom, 5.5-bathroom residence located in the peaceful community of Marvins Park, White River. Just minutes from Ocho Rios, this two-story home offers the perfect blend of comfort, space, and investment potential. Designed for both living and entertaining, this property features a well-laid-out interior complemented by inviting outdoor spaces, including a proper front verandah—perfect for enjoying cool island breezes—and a welcoming back porch ideal for relaxing or hosting gatherings. The home also includes a basement level currently used as a workshop, offering incredible flexibility. Already plumbed for a bathroom, this space can easily be transformed into a self-contained apartment, guest suite, or income-generating unit, making it a standout opportunity for savvy buyers. Property Features: 6 spacious bedrooms, 5.5 bathrooms Two-story layout with excellent flow and natural light Basement with conversion potential (plumbed for additional bathroom) 2-car carport for convenience and security Large front verandah and inviting rear porch Located in a quiet, established residential community

Premium gated community in the cool Breadnut Hill community overlooking the Ocho Rios sea front. The Palacio Rivera development is first world with modern decor, pristine finishes and amenities. Brand new and tastefully furnished 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom house with 2 outdoor gazebos for long sale in a gated residential development just off the North Coast highway in Discovery Bay, St. Ann. The community has plenty of greenery, kids play area, football field, gym, and large outdoor areas for socializing, exercise or relaxation, with all other major amenities including shopping, medical care, nightlife, tourist attractions and the famous Puerto Seco Beach within 5 minutes. 45 minutes from the airport in Montego Bay and 25 minutes from the resort town of Ocho Rios. Call, email or whatsapp agent to arrange viewing or to make offer.

Step into this unfinished 4-bedroom, 2-bathroom residence located in the serene Malvern Park Housing Scheme, Davis Town. Turnkey ready and impeccably maintained, this fully furnished 2-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom townhouse is located within the secure, gated community of Camelot Village. Welcome to the Palazzo. This 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom apartment was designed with all modern fixtures and furnishings making it a quiet, intimate space in a gated residential development just off the North Coast highway in the upscale community of Cardiff Hall, Runaway Bay in lovely St. Ann. The complex offers access to the Cardiff Hall Private Beach (5 minutes away) Perfectly located on the second floor with a balcony and a terrace which offers a modern and functional environment complimented by a spectacular ocean view . This lovely apartment is being sold fully furnished and its move in ready. Great as an investment, retirement space or simply a place for a family to call home.

This versatile unfinished property sits on approximately 1 acre and offers excellent potential for both residential living and investment. The main level features a 2-bedroom, 1-bathroom layout, while the ground floor has a self-contained studio. This multi-level design provides flexibility for extended family living or the opportunity to generate rental income from separate units. The property is also well-fruited, with a variety of established fruit trees, plants, and vegetables, creating a peaceful and productive outdoor setting. Its generous land size and flexible layout make this property ideal for someone looking to complete and customize their home while benefiting from strong income potential.

This 1-bedroom apartment is located in Tanglewood, within walking distance of the Plantation Cove concert venue. The kitchen has been fully upgraded with quartz countertops and a center island featuring a wrap-around breakfast bar. High-end functional details include an undermount sink with a glass rinser and a pull-out faucet with a digital display. Storage is maximized through stacked cedar cabinetry, deep pot drawers, and a built-in appliance garage to maintain clear counter space. The unit is being sold partially furnished and is Airbnb-ready, equipped with a refrigerator, smart Wi-Fi ceiling fans, and an LG dual inverter AC with an integrated air purifier. All closets and cabinetry are constructed from solid cedar to prevent termites. Infrastructure upgrades include a tankless water heater, a dedicated water storage tank, and a pressure pump.

Newly built townhouse offering elegant design and modern comfort in the heart of Ocho Rios. This property stands out for its many benefits. Centrally located, just off the main road in Discovery Bay, it allows easy access to many amenities. Puerto Seco Beach is within walking distance, and so is the supermarket, hardware store, restaurants, bars, and the newly renovated Total Gas Station. This corridor has similarly sized homes, which are well-maintained and therefore preserve their values. It could be a great investment property as it allows for 3 self-contained units. Downstairs is the home of a 2-bed, 1-bath unit with laundry and a kitchen. Upstairs has the following: 1-bedroom with an ensuite bathroom, which serves as the primary; a verandah; two more bedrooms with ensuite bathrooms; a kitchen, laundry, and a back patio/verandah. Beautifully maintained 3-bedroom, 3.5-bathroom home in the sought-after Pyramid Point community, St. Ann. Each bedroom features its own en-suite bathroom, TV, and AC, with a king bed in the primary suite, a queen in the second bedroom, and twin beds in the third. The living room is also air-conditioned and includes a TV, complemented by high-speed Starlink internet and tinted windows for added comfort. The kitchen is fully equipped with a Whirlpool gas stove, fridge, microwave, toaster oven, and Keurig, along with a washer and gas dryer. The home is powered by a solar system with 24 panels and 30kWh storage, allowing it to operate virtually off-grid, and includes a 250-gallon solar water heater with electric backup. Enjoy a spacious backyard with an enclosed gazebo, BBQ grill, swing chair, bicycles, irrigation system, and a concrete storage shed. Additional features include a security camera system and three backup water tanks totaling 3,000 gallons with an electric pump, ensuring comfort and reliability year-round.

Positioned just 7 minutes outside the town of Ocho Rios, Unit 126 at Pyramid Point offers a rare opportunity to own a beautifully designed residence in one of Ocho Rios’ most desirable gated communities. This well-appointed unit features a bright, open-concept layout with seamless indoor-outdoor flow, ideal for relaxed island living or effortless entertaining. Thoughtfully designed living spaces are complemented by generous bedrooms, modern finishes, and excellent natural light throughout. Residents enjoy easy access to beaches, restaurants, shopping, and major attractions, while still benefiting from privacy and a well-maintained community. Discover true homeownership at Camelot Village – Phase 2, a single detached 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom bungalow located in the secure gated community of Camelot Village in Discovery Bay. Being sold unfurnished, the home allows you to design the interior to your own style, with the option to purchase the existing furniture separately for convenience. Residents enjoy 24-hour gated security and easy access to the North Coast Highway, placing you within comfortable driving distance of both Ocho Rios and Montego Bay, as well as beaches, shopping, restaurants, and everyday amenities. Whether you are a first-time buyer, returning resident, or diaspora investor seeking a secure north coast property, this home offers comfort, value, and lifestyle.

The Vistas at Runaway Bay is located in the cools hills of the garden parish of St. Ann Jamaica's fastest growing North Coast. This developments boast Lot sizes from 4367 sq ft to 11000 sq ft and a choice of townhouses or detached bungalows. Kenjoy Villa is a serene property located in St. Ann, Jamaica. It overlooks Ocho Rios, one of the island's most famous tourist towns, and boasts sweeping views of the Caribbean Sea. Located less than a one-minute walk from the renowned Konoko Falls attraction and approximately four minutes’ drive from the heart of the town, the property offers convenient access to the area’s many commercial and tourism offerings. The villa features spacious living areas that open to several balconies with panoramic sea views, a modern kitchen, and an additional kitchen in the lower section of the home. The property comprises five generously sized bedrooms, each enjoying sea views. Outdoor spaces include a large swimming pool and lounge area surrounded by lush tropical landscaping and numerous fruit trees. The setting provides a tranquil environment while remaining close to well-known attractions including Dunn’s River Falls, Mystic Mountain and Dolphin Cove, along with a variety of shopping and dining options. Call today to make an offer on this ideally located property in one of the island’s most desirable areas.

"Heartstones" is a majestic residential sanctuary in the exclusive Ridge Estate of Shaw Park, Ocho Rios, offering privacy and breathtaking Caribbean vistas. Spanning approximately 1.62 acres of lush tropical terrain, this expansive property features three primary residential buildings and a supporting structure, providing six bedrooms, six bathrooms, and a powder room. The main residence is a stately two-storey home defined by an airy, open-concept design and a striking spiral staircase with a mahogany handrail. Large windows and grand double wooden doors invite refreshing mountain breezes and natural light into the living areas, while decorative security grilles blend safety with island charm. The grounds feature artisanal stone walls, a gravel driveway, and vibrant bougainvillea framing a uniquely shaped swimming pool and brick-paved sun deck. From the elevated stone terrace, one can gaze over the verdant canopy toward the turquoise waters of the coastline. Located just minutes from the heart of Ocho Rios, Heartstones is a legacy property awaiting a discerning owner to embrace its full tropical glory. Contact agent for viewings.

Nestled in the peaceful community of Upton, Ocho Rios, St. Ann, this property sits on approximately 4,578 sq. m. (1.13 acres) of land and presents an excellent investment and development opportunity. Experience the best of caribbean living in this modern town house located within the exclusive 24 hour secured gates of the Ocho Rios Country Club. Sitting just 1 minute off the northern coastal highway, nothing will be out of reach as there are tonnes of opportunities for work, relaxation and commerce within 15 minutes drive. If you feel you must go for a drive, however, Ocho Rios is 20 mins away, Donald Sangster Airport in Montego Bay is 45 minutes away and the commercial hub of Kingston is only 90 minutes away. This truly is a very well-priced bundle in a beautifully presented package. You could be the one to own it!

Camelot Village is a rapidly developing gated community on Discovery Bay St. Ann. It is less than 5 minutes away from Puerto Seco beach and the Discovery Bay Town Centre . Sangsters International Airport is with 45 minutes while Ocho Ocho Rios Drax Hall, Richmond are in close proximity, enabling easy access to the Tourism Corridor. If you are searching for the ultimate peaceful and tranquil property to call home or invest in, this is an opportunity you should secure immediately. Speak soon.

Ultra Modern Townhouse in the well maintained Ocho Rios Country Club (gated community) nestled in the cool hills over looking Ocho Rios. Features of the Townhouse include: split-level open concept floor plan, contemporary fixtures and fittings, modern kitchen and bathroom cabinetry, porcelain floor and wall tiles, ceiling fans, a/c unit, and balcony. Amenities of the complex are: 24hr security, swimming pool, clubhouse, gym, multipurpose courts, and expansive green spaces.

Experience the best of caribbean living in this modern town house located within the exclusive 24 hour secured gates of the Ocho Rios Country Club. Nestled atop Milford Hill, this house offers contemporary luxury, unmatched amenities and breathtaking views just minutes from the bustling resort town of Ocho Rios and its world famous attractions. Highlights includes: spacious layout, three ensuite bedrooms, modern finishes, panoramic views, outdoor space, swimming pool and gym.
